name: Kwai for Advertisers
description: Kuaishous global mobile ad platform offering short-video interstitial and rewarded inventory for app user acquisition.

seo.title: Kwai for Advertisers — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Kwai for Advertisers: Kuaishous global mobile ad platform offering short-video interstitial and rewarded inventory for app user acquisition.

when_to_use: Short-video mobile ad inventory from Kuaishou for app user acquisition
Rewarded video campaigns targeting Kwai's global audience for installs
Interstitial and in-feed video ad UA for apps targeting LatAm and MENA Kwai users
CPI campaigns on Kwai platform for games targeting non-US/EU markets

pros: Access to Kuaishou's short-video inventory globally
Competitive CPMs in LATAM and SEA
cons: Creative specs differ from TikTok norms
review.verdict: Underpriced short-video alternative to TikTok Ads, but expect rougher edges and regional focus.
review.best_for: Apps targeting young users in LATAM, Brazil, SEA, or other Kwai-strong geos.
review.not_for: US/EU-first brands needing the audience and polish of Meta or TikTok.
